steps.t: Lúka has asked you to collect some twistbeard. Twistbeard can be found on rocks in Tharkh Shathur, to the south-east of Ashmargathâl.
You have collected all the twistbeard you could find. You should return to Ashmargathâl and give the twistbeard to Lúka.
Lúka has asked you to clean the wounds of injured scouts. The scouts are resting around Ashmargathâl.
You should let Lúka know that you have cleaned the scouts' wounds.
